proposed_mutations: drop primitive trade_imbalance_signed; new formula = ask_depth_concentration > 0.4
reasoning: Parent WR=68.2%, n=66. Feedback cited 'extreme performance inconsistency' and recommended dropping a feature. The `ask_depth_concentration` primitive has a stronger historical track record of stability than `trade_imbalance_signed`. This proposal drops the latter to test if a simpler signal based on the more robust primitive is more stable.
